prompt: Change the season to winter. The atmosphere should remain calm and peaceful.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, transforming its vibrant, autumnal landscape into a calm and peaceful winter scene. Replace the yellow and green foliage on the hills and around the houses with bare branches and snow-dusted trees. Cover the red and orange foreground and fields with a blanket of white snow. Adjust the sky and lighting to convey the quiet serenity of a winter day.
